queries.question: What are features all banking platforms have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Features.feature_value  from Online_Banking_Platforms_Features join Features on Online_Banking_Platforms_Features.feature_id = Features.feature_id join Online_Banking_Platforms on Online_Banking_Platforms_Features.platform_id = Online_Banking_Platforms.id   GROUP BY Online_Banking_Platforms_Features.feature_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Online_Banking_Platforms_Features.platform_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Online_Banking_Platforms)

queries.question: For each banking platform, list features they have.
queries.sql: select online_banking_platforms.name , features.feature_value from Online_Banking_Platforms_Features join Features on Online_Banking_Platforms_Features.feature_id = Features.feature_id join Online_Banking_Platforms on Online_Banking_Platforms_Features.platform_id = Online_Banking_Platforms.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?feature_value WHERE {
  ?online_banking_platforms_features a :Online_Banking_Platforms_Features .
  ?features a :Features .
  ?online_banking_platforms_features p:hasFeatures ?features .
  ?online_banking_platforms a :Online_Banking_Platforms .
  ?online_banking_platforms_features p:hasOnline_Banking_Platforms ?online_banking_platforms .
  ?online_banking_platforms p:name ?name .
  ?features p:feature_value ?feature_value .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me features every banking platform has.
